title: digitalis lutea var. mesatlantica
intro: Digitalis lutea var. mesatlantica, a variety of the Foxglove plant, is a flowering perennial with yellow flowers that contains the cardiac glycoside digoxin. The medicinal properties of Digitalis lutea var. mesatlantica include its ability to increase the force of cardiac contractions, thereby improving heart function, particularly in cases of atrial fibrillation or congestive heart failure. The health benefits of this plant include improved cardiovascular health, increased energy, and reduced symptoms of heart failure. Digitalis lutea var. mesatlantica is often prepared as a tincture or dried extract for medicinal use, although it should only be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity.
